| 7 | Structural | `crime_00011` `logic_in_comments` in `src/billing.ts` | fix now | Comment contains an authorization rule. Encode as guard/test while working near refund behavior. |
| 8 | Structural | `crime_00003` `commented_out_code` in `src/billing.ts` | fix now | Cheap removal; stale code near refund logic can mislead agents. |
| 9 | Structural | `crime_00006` `weak_test_signal` in `src/billing.test.ts` | fix now | No-assert test gives false confidence. Add observable assertion or delete it. |
| 10 | Structural | `crime_00010` `large_file` in `src/billing.ts` | defer | Real risk, but only barely over threshold at 310 lines. Split opportunistically after smaller billing cleanups clarify boundaries. |
